text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice Tokai Teio spying on Mejiro<n>McQueen as
she trains...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're just the person I wanted<n>to see!
Could I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I need to find out why McQueen was<n>chosen to
appear on the URA poster,<n>but I haven't figured it
out yet...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it looks like she's already<n>figured out why I
was chosen...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sooo could you find out what answer<n>McQueen
came up with? Oh, but be<n>subtle about it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself semi-coerced<n>into quizzing
Mejiro McQueen for<n>information...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you... I regret that you had to<n>witness that
unsightly exhibition the<n>other day...
choice_data_list: There's something I want to ask you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Actually, I'd appreciate<n>your advice
as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been posed a certain question<n>and I'm
having difficulty deducing an<n>answer...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro McQueen and<n>Tokai Teio are
both struggling with the<n>same task. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, hey! What are you<n>doing?! Don't
come over here!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since they're having trouble with the<n>same
issue, I speed up the process<n>by getting them to
talk to each other.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! So you're not onto<n>anything either?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Why were you acting so carefree<n>when you
didn't even have the<n>answer yet?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You were the one teasing me as ifyou had already settled on ananswer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The heck? I can't believe you went<n>crying to the
trainer for help after<n>acting all tough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? I believe you soughtout help before I did!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well... That's 'cause, um... Uhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just didn't want to lose, that's all! I<n>mean, look
at you...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You've got all these strengths that I<n>don't have.
You're patient and you<n>never give up, no matter
what problem<n>you're facing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I got all panicked 'cause I figured that<n>
persistence of yours would lead you<n>to an
answer before me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I... feel the same, actually. I assumed<n>you'd
already found an answer using<n>some unique
method that never would<n>have occurred to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our answers... Oh. Each of us has<n>strengths that
the other lacks...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Right... That's why we were chosen!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Each of you has strengths that the<n>other lacks... I
see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You mean to say that alone you<n>would each be
lacking, but as a pair<n>you form a complete
package?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mm, not exactly. It's more like...<n>when I watch
McQueen, I can see<n>where I'm lacking.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm motivated to get stronger and<n>fill in those
blanks... 'cause I don't<n>want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We're not perfect. But as long as we<n>continue to
compete against one other<n>without becoming
disheartened, then<n>we can keep getting stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's the reason you chose us,<n>correct? This
dynamic we share?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! I was curious as to what<n>you two
would discover...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But your answer far exceeded my<n>expectations.
As you two compete,<n>you encourage each other
and<n>influence so many, all while carving<n>out a
new path...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you better each other, the light that<n>you shine
will illuminate a path toward<n>the future!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, Prez praised us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You mustn't revel too much.Nothing good ever comes of youroverexcit—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Have you seen that poster featuring<n>Teio and
McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They both looked so beautiful!<n>Elegant, yet cool!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I hope we get to be on a poster like<n>that
someday!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! It's gonna happen for sure!<n>And that's a
promise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see... So that's what she meant by<n>"a light that
shines toward the future."<n>...Well, that's all the
more reason to<n>get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Let's get way, way stronger!<n>Then we'll
shine so bright that<n>everyone's gonna have to
cover their<n>eyes!
